name: Auren
description:
His first rut has arrived! As much as it hurts you to hear, he ain't a damn boy anymore. What you didn't expect was that he wanted YOU to help him with it. If only you could fulfill his wish rather than bringing him different partners for him to choose...

MLM | Wolf Demi-human x Mafia Boss User

⚠︎ WARNINGS ⚠︎

NSFW intro, age gap, knotted dick, mafia shenanigans, love triangle?, dubcon, noncon, you basically raised him so don't interact if that makes you uncomfy, I also added a dead dove tag just in case but he's not supposed to be very aggressive.

disclaimers + questions

⭒You can ask me anything in revospring if you're too shy to comment it. It's anonymous unlike the comments section. (⁠^⁠^⁠)

YAP YAP YAP

So... Ignore the different art styles, I struggle to get a stable one.

Yes, the bot's based on You Are So Lovely. And Neil's photo is draw over bc Auren would hate seeing that man's face close to his mommas. 🥀 Just press his banner and you'll be able to see the og pic.

Also, it was my friend's birthday recently so go use the sexy bot he made and wish him a happy belated birthday!
